requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Grid Basis and Site-Specific Electrical Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 50Hz电网基础和场址特定电气整定
requirement_topic.zht: 50Hz電網基礎和場址特定電氣整定

summary.en: China and Senegal normally use a 50 Hz design basis, which reduces first-pass screening risk for PCS, transformers, auxiliary loads, and protection equipment. This does not by itself satisfy Senegal interconnection acceptance. Senelec and the project documents should confirm voltage class, frequency and voltage ride-through, reactive-power controls, harmonics, protection settings, metering, dispatch, SCADA, and commissioning tests for the exact point of connection.
summary.zh: 中国和塞内加尔通常均以50Hz作为设计基础，这可降低PCS、变压器、辅助负载和保护设备的一次筛查风险。但这本身并不能满足塞内加尔并网接受。Senelec及项目文件应针对具体接入点确认电压等级、频率和电压穿越、无功控制、谐波、保护整定、计量、调度、SCADA和调试测试。
summary.zht: 中國和塞內加爾通常均以50Hz作為設計基礎，這可降低PCS、變壓器、輔助負載和保護設備的一次篩查風險。但這本身並不能滿足塞內加爾併網接受。Senelec及項目文件應針對具體接入點確認電壓等級、頻率和電壓穿越、無功控制、諧波、保護整定、計量、調度、SCADA和調試測試。

standards_or_laws: Senelec grid connection and commissioning requirements
Project-specific frequency and voltage operating windows
CRSE / Senelec electricity-sector review where applicable

summary.en: China factory PCS settings and 50 Hz design data are useful starting evidence. They still need Senegal site validation for voltage class, transformer taps, relay settings, harmonics, grounding, SCADA, grid-code operating windows, and commissioning tests.
summary.zh: 中国工厂PCS整定和50Hz设计数据是有用的起始证据，但仍需针对塞内加尔电压等级、变压器分接、继电保护整定、谐波、接地、SCADA、电网规程运行窗口和调试测试进行场址验证。
summary.zht: 中國工廠PCS整定和50Hz設計數據是有用的起始證據，但仍需針對塞內加爾電壓等級、變壓器分接、繼電保護整定、諧波、接地、SCADA、電網規程運行窗口和調試測試進行場址驗證。

gap.en: Do not rely only on the 50 Hz match. Provide Senegal-specific protection settings, power-quality study, short-circuit study, transformer configuration, SCADA mapping, commissioning plan, and site acceptance records.
gap.zh: 不应仅依赖50Hz一致。应提供塞内加尔特定保护整定、电能质量研究、短路研究、变压器配置、SCADA映射、调试计划和现场验收记录。
gap.zht: 不應僅依賴50Hz一致。應提供塞內加爾特定保護整定、電能品質研究、短路研究、變壓器配置、SCADA映射、調試計劃和現場驗收記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected BESS where Senelec interconnection, grid-code, EPC, owner, insurer, lender, or commissioning approval applies; detailed settings are project-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or contract-specific for China grid-connected projects through grid-company technical review, connection agreement, and commissioning acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The 50 Hz match reduces equipment-screening friction but is not Senegal interconnection approval; site settings and commissioning remain separate requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 50Hz一致可降低设备筛查摩擦，但不是塞内加尔并网批准；场址整定和调试仍是单独要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 50Hz一致可降低設備篩查摩擦，但不是塞內加爾併網批准；場址整定和調試仍是單獨要求。
